title: World First Join Message
description: World First Join Message is a customizable mod that displays a unique welcome message when a player joins for the first time.
body:
World_First_Join_Message is a lightweight yet powerful Minecraft mod that adds a unique and personalized twist to your server and modpack. With this mod, you can display a custom message whenever a new player joins your world for the very first time. Perfect for creating a welcoming environment on multiplayer servers ,modpack or adding a touch of flair to single-player adventures.

Features:

  • Customizable Messages: Set unique first-time join messages with full color and style formatting.
  • Player Recognition: Displays the first-join message only once per player.
  • Server-Wide Appeal: Great for community servers to welcome new members with a personalized touch.
  • Lightweight & Compatible: Designed to work seamlessly with other mods and plugins.

Make every player's first join an unforgettable experience with World_First_Join_Message!

Let your imagination run wild with creative welcomes and make your server stand out from the rest. Download now and give your players the warm greeting they deserve!

Installation and Configuration Instructions for World_First_Join_Message

Install the Mod:

  1. Download the mod from CurseForge and place it into the mods folder of your Minecraft directory.

Launch Minecraft:

  1. Start Minecraft with the mod installed.

  2. The mod will be loaded, and its settings can be adjusted in-game.

Accessing In-Game Configuration:

  1. Open Minecraft and go to the Mods menu.

  2. Locate World First Join Message and click on Configure (if using ModMenu or Forge's built-in config GUI).

  3. Customize the following settings:

Now, all configurations can be managed directly from the game without manually editing any files! 🚀

[welcome_message]
	#Enable or disable the welcome message
	enabled = true
	#The message to be displayed when a player joins the game for the first time
	text = "THANKS TO OUR SPONSORS, ZAP-HOSTING! Support Reggarf And Save BIG - 
             USE CODE Reggarf-1047 FOR 20% OFF Your ORDER!"
	#The RGB color code for the welcome message.
	#Examples: 'FF0000' for red, '00FF00' for green, '0000FF' for blue
	#'FFFF00' for yellow, 'FF00FF' for magenta, '00FFFF' for cyan
	color = "FFFFFF"
	#The URL to be opened when the player clicks the link
	url = "https://zap-hosting.com/reggarf"
	#The RGB color code for the clickable text '[Click here]',
	#Examples: 'FF0000' for red, '00FF00' for green, '0000FF' for blue
	#'FFFF00' for yellow, 'FF00FF' for magenta, '00FFFF' for cyan, 'FFFFFF' for white
	clickableColor = "00FFAA"

Your server or modpack is now ready to welcome new players with a custom, vibrant message!
